description_long: This is a four-light wall sconce fixture with a horizontally elongated, rounded rectangular backplate. Each of the four conical lamp shades is evenly spaced and projects outward from the backplate, supported by short, curved arms. The fixture appears to be constructed primarily from metal, likely steel or aluminum, with smooth, clean surfaces and a uniform finish. The shades are simple and unadorned, suggesting a utilitarian or contemporary design. The mounting plate has a subtle beveled edge, adding a slight visual depth to the otherwise minimalist form. There are no visible decorative motifs, and the fixture is designed for wall mounting, suitable for use in bathrooms, hallways, or above mirrors in urban environments.
description: A four-light wall sconce with conical shades and a rounded rectangular backplate, featuring a clean, minimalist metal design.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four conical lamp shades evenly spaced on the elongated backplate.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the outward projection of the shades and the depth of the fixture from the wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backplate and the bases of the shades, with minimal detail on the shades themselves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile and spacing of the shades from the backplate.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a minimalist, contemporary design with clean lines and a focus on function over ornamentation. Its smooth surfaces and simple conical shades give it a modern, utilitarian appearance.
